description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that runs on push and pull request events with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-22.04, macos-11, macos-12) and etcd versions (v3.2.32, v3.3.27, v3.4.27, v3.5.9). For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies, build and install cpprestsdk, and run various tests with different etcd versions.
